prose.title: 79s mos
prose.body: The 79S MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is a U.S. Army MOS that stands for Recruiting and Retention NCO (Non-Commissioned Officer). Soldiers in this MOS are responsible for recruiting and retaining qualified individuals for the Army. They work with potential recruits, conduct interviews, process applications, and provide information about Army opportunities and benefits. They also assist with the retention of current soldiers through mentorship, counseling, and support.
